title: Fine Art Paintings
description: Adds 26 more vanilla style art paintings
body:
**This Mod adds 26 more vanilla style art paintings**

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d27e72a0138b44498209e26983f4b0351eda8a15.jpeg)


- Paintings appear randomly in the same way as the vanilla ones.
- The new paintings do not replace any existing paintings.
- There are some landscapes, some abstracts, and a couple famous paintings by artists like Monet and Van Gogh.


_Special thanks to Smythe71!_

**Feel free to put it in your modpack!**
